summary: SEO Batch 1 testing for 8 pages. 35/45 tests passed (77.8%). Key findings: (1) Meta descriptions not being replaced by react-helmet-async - Helmet adds duplicate meta tags instead of replacing the original from index.html. (2) Healthcare route mismatch - /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration uses MedicalClinics.jsx (old DOM method) not Healthcare.jsx (new Helmet). Titles, canonicals, keywords, and FAQ schemas working correctly on most pages.

seo_issues.issue: Meta description not being replaced - react-helmet-async adds duplicate meta tag instead of replacing index.html default
seo_issues.expected: Single meta description with page-specific content
seo_issues.actual: Two meta description tags: original from index.html + new one from Helmet
seo_issues.root_cause: react-helmet-async not properly overriding meta tags with data-rh='true'

seo_issues.issue: Route /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration maps to MedicalClinics.jsx which uses old document.title/meta DOM manipulation, not Healthcare.jsx with new react-helmet-async
seo_issues.expected: Healthcare.jsx should be used for /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration route
seo_issues.actual: MedicalClinics.jsx at line 122 of App.js handles this route with old SEO method

seo_issues.issue: Missing canonical URL, keywords meta, and JSON-LD FAQ schema

passed: /: Title contains 'Merchant Solutions Corp | Payment Processing'
/contact: Title contains 'Contact Us | Merchant Solutions Corp'
failed: /company/about: Meta description not showing page-specific content
/restaurant-payment-processing-services: Meta description not showing page-specific content
/retail-payment-solutions: Meta description not showing page-specific content
/salon-spa-payment-processing: Meta description not showing page-specific content
/medical-payment-processing-emr-integration: Meta description does not contain 'HIPAA compliant' (uses MedicalClinics.jsx)
/medical-payment-processing-emr-integration: No canonical link tag (MedicalClinics.jsx doesn't set it)
/medical-payment-processing-emr-integration: No keywords meta tag (MedicalClinics.jsx doesn't set it)
/medical-payment-processing-emr-integration: No JSON-LD FAQ schema (MedicalClinics.jsx doesn't set it)
/dental-payment-processing-emr-integration: Meta description not showing page-specific content

action_items: HIGH: Fix route mapping - Either update /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration in App.js to use Healthcare.jsx instead of MedicalClinics.jsx, OR add Helmet SEO to MedicalClinics.jsx

MEDIUM: Fix meta description override - react-helmet-async is appending instead of replacing. Options: (1) Remove data-rh='true' from index.html and let Helmet manage all meta tags, (2) Use Helmet's defer prop, (3) Remove default meta description from index.html entirely
LOW: MedicalClinics.jsx needs: canonical URL, keywords meta, and JSON-LD FAQ schema if keeping current route mapping
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx (lines 31-36): Helmet correctly configured with title, description, keywords, canonical
Healthcare.jsx (lines 198-204): Helmet + faqSchema correctly configured BUT not used for /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration route
MedicalClinics.jsx (lines 77-86): Uses OLD document.title and DOM manipulation method - needs conversion to react-helmet-async
App.js line 122: Route /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration maps to MedicalClinics component, not Healthcare
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Batch 1 tested 8 pages. Key findings: (1) Meta descriptions have duplicate tag issue - Helmet appends instead of replaces the index.html default. First meta tag (from index.html) has data-rh='true' but is not being replaced. (2) Route /medical-payment-processing-emr-integration uses MedicalClinics.jsx (old DOM method at lines 77-86) not Healthcare.jsx (new Helmet). MedicalClinics.jsx needs either replacement in App.js routing OR conversion to react-helmet-async with canonical, keywords, and FAQ schema. All other pages have correct title, canonical, keywords, and FAQ schemas. Home page detected 2 meta description tags proving the duplicate issue.
rca_of_issue:
Root Cause Analysis:

1. META DESCRIPTION DUPLICATE ISSUE:
- index.html line 7 has: <meta name='description' data-rh='true' content='...'>
- react-helmet-async should replace tags with matching data-rh='true' but is instead appending new tags
- DOM inspection shows 2 meta description tags: one from index.html (first), one from Helmet (second)
- Search engines typically use the first meta tag, so Helmet's tag is ignored
- Fix: Remove default meta description from index.html OR investigate react-helmet-async configuration

2. HEALTHCARE ROUTE MISMATCH:
- App.js line 122: <Route path='/medical-payment-processing-emr-integration' element={<MedicalClinics />} />
- Healthcare.jsx exists at line 117 for route /industries/healthcare
- MedicalClinics.jsx uses old document.title method (lines 77-86) instead of Helmet
- The main agent task mentioned Healthcare.jsx but the actual route uses MedicalClinics.jsx
- Fix: Either change App.js to use Healthcare or add Helmet to MedicalClinics.jsx
